'''Imdaar Alpha''' was a [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Imdaar/Legends|Imdaar]]. [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Martio Batch]] had the massive [[Imdaar Alpha research station]] there which was fastened on the most part of one of the moon's hemispheres. It developed an advanced [[Cloaking device/Legends|cloaking device]] and the first of the [[TIE/ph "Phantom" Multi-Role Stealth Starfighter/Legends|TIE Phantoms]]. However the moon appeared empty since the station itself made use of the cloaking technology, being thus invisible.

The moon lost a significant part of its mass when the Imperial facility [[Mission to Imdaar|exploded]].

{{Moon-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Although ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' includes an entry for Imdaar Alpha, the book confuses the moon with the planet it [[Orbit/Legends|orbits]], [[Imdaar/Legends|Imdaar]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Rebel Assault II: The Hidden Empire]]'' {{1st}}
